exampleSentencesTranslated: This pillow is very soft so I sleep very well.
I like eating soft bread more than hard bread.
She bought a very soft towel at the supermarket yesterday.
notes_md:
**mềm** = soft (not hard), easy to press, bend, or chew.

It’s an adjective, usually placed **after** the noun in Vietnamese.  

It describes things like food, fabric, hair, skin, or objects that aren’t hard. It can also describe a **voice or tone** meaning gentle or not harsh.  

Opposite: **cứng** (hard).
exampleSentences: Chiếc gối này rất mềm nên em ngủ rất ngon.
Anh thích ăn bánh mì mềm hơn bánh mì cứng.
Chị mua một cái khăn tắm rất mềm ở siêu thị hôm qua.

definitions.es: Tener una superficie suave, gentil o que cede.
definitions.en: Having a smooth, gentle, or yielding surface.
definitions.vi: Có bề mặt mịn màng, nhẹ nhàng hoặc dễ uốn.
